Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction

full_text:
Gou An 句安
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gou An (句安). Was sent to defend the city of Qushan with Li Xin but was overwhelmed by Guo Huai forces despite reinforcement by Jiang Wei. Gou An was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
